_comment: Shipped preset for vanilla SD1.5 text-to-image. Outer graph: CheckpointLoader #4 → CLIPTextEncode (#6 pos, #7 neg) → KSampler #3 → VAEDecode #8 → SaveImage #9. Bindings hook ImageStage's main_prompt to the positive prompt node, sizing widgets to EmptyLatentImage #5, and KSampler's seed to a fresh random_int31 each Run. Negative prompt stays at the workflow's default ('text, watermark').
label: Local SD1.5
description: Vanilla Stable Diffusion 1.5 text-to-image. The prompt drives the positive CLIPTextEncode; resolution / aspect_ratio drive width/height on EmptyLatentImage; seed is randomized per Run.
